Analyze the PR diff. Run: gh pr diff {{PR_NUMBER}}

Summarize:
1. Files changed (group by area/component)
2. Nature of each change (new code, modification, deletion, rename)
3. Any breaking changes (removed public APIs, changed signatures, renamed exports, changed DB schemas)
4. Any test files added or modified
5. Lines added/removed count estimate

Return a structured summary. Be concise but thorough.
